company_description: Hugging Face hosts the largest open-source ML model hub with inference APIs.
Replicate runs open-source ML models via a cloud API for developers.
Modal is a serverless cloud for running Python and ML workloads.
LanceDB is an embedded vector database for AI applications with Lance format.
Chroma is an open-source AI-native embedding database for LLM applications.
Weaviate is an open-source vector database for semantic search and RAG applications.
Zilliz is the company behind Milvus open-source vector database for AI workloads.
MotherDuck is a serverless analytics platform built on DuckDB for fast in-process queries.
Astronomer is the commercial distribution of Apache Airflow for data orchestration.
Dagster is an open-source data orchestration platform for ML and data engineering.
Modal provides serverless GPU cloud for running AI model inference.
Marqo is a tensor search engine for multimodal AI and enterprise search.
Airbyte is an open-source data integration platform used in modern ML and data stacks.
Bytebase is a database DevOps platform for managing schema changes and compliance.
Cube is a semantic layer for analytics enabling AI-driven BI applications.
Dify is an open-source LLM app development platform for building AI workflows and agents.
Flowise is an open-source drag-and-drop UI for building LLM applications.
LangChain builds open-source infrastructure for LLM-powered applications and agents.
LlamaIndex is a data framework for connecting LLMs to enterprise data sources for RAG.
Portkey is an AI gateway providing observability routing and guardrails for LLM APIs.
PromptLayer is a platform for tracking managing and evaluating LLM prompts.
Fixie enables developers to build and host conversational AI agents using LLMs.
E2B provides secure sandboxed code execution for AI coding agents and developers.
SuperAGI is an open-source platform for building deploying and managing AI agents.
AgentOps provides developer tools for testing debugging and deploying AI agents.
Phidata is an open-source platform for building multi-modal AI assistants and agents.
LM Studio enables running local LLMs on laptop and desktop hardware for developers.
Ollama makes it easy to run large language models locally with a simple API.
BentoML is an open platform for shipping AI applications and model serving.
SkyPilot is an open-source framework for running ML workloads on any cloud at lowest cost.
